success_factors: Workflow completed all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize) with overall status=success.
Import-based adapter strategy was feasible (import_feasibility=0.88, low intrusiveness risk), reducing integration friction.
Generated MCP package bootstrapped successfully and reported healthy service state over stdio transport.
Repository structure and pyproject metadata were sufficient for static analysis and plugin scaffolding.
failure_reasons: No hard workflow failure occurred; however, functional completeness is low because zero explicit MCP endpoints/tools were registered.
Original project test signal is unreliable (original_project.passed=false with execution_time=0 and empty test_files despite test_coverage='100%'), indicating test execution/collection mismatch.
DeepWiki analysis failed, reducing architecture/context confidence for advanced generation decisions.
Performance telemetry is missing (all zero/unknown), preventing runtime quality validation.
